nasb.text: Then Solomon sat on the throne of the Lord as king instead of David his father; and he prospered, and all Israel obeyed him.

esv.text: Then Solomon sat on the throne of the Lord as king in place of David his father. And he prospered, and all Israel obeyed him.

cnv.text: 於是所羅門坐在耶和華所賜的位上，接續他父親大衛作王；他凡事亨通，以色列眾人都聽從他。

ccb.text: 于是，所罗门登上了耶和华所赐的王位，接替他父亲大卫做王。他凡事亨通，以色列众人都服从他，
